description_long: This bird features an olive-green to brownish plumage with subtle gradients across its body, giving it a natural, earthy appearance. Its beak is long, slender, and slightly curved, well-suited for probing or foraging. The wings and tail are darker, with the tail tapering to a pointed end, and the wings showing a faint layering of feathers. The legs are short and appear to be a muted gray or brown, blending with the overall coloration. The bird's body is streamlined, with a smooth transition from head to tail, and the eyes are small and dark. The surface texture of the feathers appears matte and soft, with minimal gloss or reflectivity.
description: A streamlined bird with olive-brown plumage, a long slender beak, and a pointed tail. Its feathers are matte and soft, with subtle gradients and dark wings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bird, highlighting the slender beak, smooth body, and pointed tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the layered feather pattern on the wings and the symmetry of the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the beak and tail, with slight differences in feather shading.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pointed tail and the rounded back, with the beak barely visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradients and faint layering on wings
